# Taylormade Creative

> Taylormade Creative is a Dallas–Fort Worth (DFW) creative studio led by director and designer Nelson Taylor. It produces cinematic video, professional photography, AI content systems, custom websites, social media content, and live AI/creative workshops — all in-house, all bookable online with real calendar availability and secure Stripe payment.

Key facts:
- Based in Dallas–Fort Worth, Texas; shoots on location everywhere.
- Led by Nelson Taylor: 14 years of creative direction and graphic design; also shipped a native iOS app to the App Store.
- Camera platform: Sony FX6 (cinema video) and Sony A7RV (stills).
- Clients have included TONI&GUY, Neutrogena, Oribe, Foot Locker, Takis, Goldwell, R+Co, KMS, MYX, Blackgirl Sunscreen, La Supreme Dallas, and Marviano Cosmetics.
- Booking: clients pick a live time slot at https://www.taylormadecreative.net/book/ and pay online; confirmation, shoot-prep, and reminder emails are automatic.
- Digitals sessions (rapid-fire photos for actors/models/creators) are a flat $100.
- Custom websites start at $1,200.
- Standard terms: 50% deposit locks the date, balance due on shoot day, ~2-week delivery with two rounds of edits, delivered through a private client portal.

## Services
- [Video Production](https://www.taylormadecreative.net/video-production/): music videos, brand films, commercials, event films.
- [Photography](https://www.taylormadecreative.net/photography/): headshots, branding photoshoots, product photography, $100 digitals.
- [AI Content & Automation](https://www.taylormadecreative.net/ai-creative/): AI avatars, generated campaigns, automated content systems.
- [Web Design](https://www.taylormadecreative.net/web-design/): landing pages to full business websites, from $1,200.
- [Social Media Content](https://www.taylormadecreative.net/social-media/): monthly reels, carousels, and strategy retainers.
- [Live Workshops & Training](https://www.taylormadecreative.net/workshops/): hands-on AI and creative training for teams and organizations.

## Booking
- [Book a shoot](https://www.taylormadecreative.net/book/): live calendar, online payment, instant confirmation.
- [FAQs](https://www.taylormadecreative.net/faqs/): turnaround, deposits, travel, delivery.

## Contact
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/taylormade_creative/
- Client portal: https://book.taylormadecreative.net/
